query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       psd.stationCode,
       COUNT(*) AS detail_rows,
       COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS distinct_event_rows,
       COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS duplicate_rows,
       ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints) * 100, 2) AS display_points
FROM productivity_score_details psd
WHERE psd.userId = 750212
  AND psd.businessDate >= '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), psd.stationCode
ORDER BY business_date DESC, psd.stationCode;

SELECT psd.stationEventId,
       COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count,
       DATE_FORMAT(MIN(psd.businessDate), '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       MIN(psd.stationCode) AS station_code
FROM productivity_score_details psd
WHERE psd.userId = 750212
  AND psd.businessDate >= '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY psd.stationEventId
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY duplicate_count DESC, psd.stationEventId DESC
LIMIT 20;
